zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱下行
zh.content:
当前ETH/美元整体呈震荡偏弱结构，价格运行在1580下方，短期反弹动能不足，仍受空头压制，市场情绪偏谨慎。短线承压明显延续震荡格局  

技术指标显示价格持续位于20日均线1583下方，均线呈压制状态，MACD维持负值扩大，动能偏空，RSI缺失但弱势结构明显短期偏空  

下方关键支撑位关注1560-1562区间，若失守可能进一步下探，上方阻力集中在1583及1600整数关口，突破需量能配合需持续关注  

操作上建议保持偏空思路，反弹至1580-1585区间可考虑分批做空，止损设在1600上方，目标下看1560及更低支撑位严格控风险

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading around 1568.89, showing a mild intraday decline and a broader short-term bearish tilt. Price action remains compressed within a narrow daily range between 1574.27 and 1561.93, indicating consolidation rather than a decisive breakout. The inability to reclaim the 20-day SMA at 1583.35 suggests sellers still dominate near upper levels, while momentum remains subdued as the market awaits clearer directional catalysts.

Momentum indicators reinforce the cautious tone, with MACD reading at -2.56423 signaling continued bearish pressure below the zero line. Although RSI is not provided, price behavior beneath the 20-day SMA typically aligns with weakening momentum and reduced buying strength. The market structure suggests short-term sellers are gradually absorbing demand, limiting upside follow-through and keeping rallies fragile and quickly sold into.

Immediate support is forming near the daily low zone around 1561.93, with a deeper cushion around 1550 where prior consolidation activity has emerged. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined at the 20-day SMA near 1583.35, followed by a stronger barrier around 1600, where multiple rejections have previously occurred. A break beyond either boundary would likely determine the next directional expansion phase.

From a trading perspective, range-bound strategies remain favorable while price holds between support and resistance extremes. Traders may consider accumulating near support zones with tight risk control below 1550, while short-term bearish setups could be favored on rejection of the 1583–1600 resistance band. Confirmation through volume expansion or a sustained break outside the range is essential before positioning for trend continuation, with volatility likely to expand in coming sessions.
